mapper.select: SELECT ID, EQUIP_BIG_CATEGORY_ID, EQUIP_BIG_CATEGORY_NAME, EQUIP_MIDDLE_CATEGORY_ID, EQUIP_MIDDLE_CATEGORY_NAME, EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_ID, EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_NAME, EQUIP_NAME, SPECIFIC_CODE, MODEL_NUMBER, EQUIP_CODE, EQUIP_SYSTEM_CODE, EQUIP_TECH_STATE, EQUIP_TECH_STATE_NAME, EQUIP_STATE, EQUIP_STATE_NAME, UNIT, UNIT_NAME, INSURANCE_DATE, USE_COMPANY_ID, USE_ORG_ID, IS_PARTICULAR, LONGITUDE, LATITUDE, RESPONSI_CODE, REMARK, ASSETS_NO, ASSETS_NAME, SOURCE_TYPE, SOURCE_TYPE_NAME, APPROVE_TYPE, ASSETS_NUM, ASSETS_CATEGORY_TYPE, RUN_STATUS, ENERGY_STATUS, OIL_NUM_TYPE, ITEM_CATEGORY, ITEM_NAME, ASSETS_TYPE, FLOW_ID, PK_USEDORG, PK_OWNERORG, DEFINE4, DEFINE8, DEFINE13, DEFINE14, DEFINE15, DEFINE18, DEFINE19, DEFINE20, DEFINE21, DEFINE22, DEFINE23, DEFINE109, DEFINE28, DEFINE44, PK_ORG, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, DEL_FLAG FROM E_M_EQPT_INFO WHERE ID = #{id} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_M_EQPT_INFO ( ID, EQUIP_BIG_CATEGORY_ID, EQUIP_BIG_CATEGORY_NAME, EQUIP_MIDDLE_CATEGORY_ID, EQUIP_MIDDLE_CATEGORY_NAME, EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_ID, EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_NAME, EQUIP_NAME, SPECIFIC_CODE, MODEL_NUMBER, EQUIP_CODE, EQUIP_SYSTEM_CODE, EQUIP_TECH_STATE, EQUIP_TECH_STATE_NAME, EQUIP_STATE, EQUIP_STATE_NAME, UNIT, UNIT_NAME, INSURANCE_DATE, USE_COMPANY_ID, USE_ORG_ID, IS_PARTICULAR, LONGITUDE, LATITUDE, RESPONSI_CODE, REMARK, ASSETS_NO, ASSETS_NAME, SOURCE_TYPE, SOURCE_TYPE_NAME, APPROVE_TYPE, ASSETS_NUM, ASSETS_CATEGORY_TYPE, RUN_STATUS, ENERGY_STATUS, OIL_NUM_TYPE, ITEM_CATEGORY, ITEM_NAME, ASSETS_TYPE, FLOW_ID, PK_USEDORG, PK_OWNERORG, DEFINE4, DEFINE8, DEFINE13, DEFINE14, DEFINE15, DEFINE18, DEFINE19, DEFINE20, DEFINE21, DEFINE22, DEFINE23, DEFINE109, DEFINE28, DEFINE44, PK_ORG, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, DEL_FLAG ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{equipBigCategoryId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{equipBigCategoryName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{equipMiddleCategoryId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{equipMiddleCategoryName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{equipSmallCategoryId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{equipSmallCategoryName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{equipName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specificCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{equipCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{equipSystemCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{equipTechState,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{equipTechStateName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{equipState,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{equipStateName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{unit,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{insuranceDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useCompanyId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{useOrgId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{isParticular,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{longitude,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{latitude,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{responsiCode,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetsNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceType,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{sourceTypeName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{approveType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetsNum,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{assetsCategoryType,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{runStatus,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{energyStatus,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{oilNumType,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{itemCategory,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{itemName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetsType,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{flowId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{pkUsedorg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pkOwnerorg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{define4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{define8,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{define13,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{define14,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{define15,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{define18,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{define19,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{define20,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{define21,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{define22,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{define23,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{define109,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{define28,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{define44,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pkOrg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE E_M_EQPT_INFO
EQUIP_BIG_CATEGORY_ID = #{equipBigCategoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
EQUIP_BIG_CATEGORY_NAME = #{equipBigCategoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EQUIP_MIDDLE_CATEGORY_ID = #{equipMiddleCategoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
EQUIP_MIDDLE_CATEGORY_NAME = #{equipMiddleCategoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_ID = #{equipSmallCategoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_NAME = #{equipSmallCategoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EQUIP_NAME = #{equipName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SPECIFIC_CODE = #{specificCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MODEL_NUMBER = #{modelNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EQUIP_CODE = #{equipCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EQUIP_SYSTEM_CODE = #{equipSystemCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EQUIP_TECH_STATE = #{equipTechState,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EQUIP_TECH_STATE_NAME = #{equipTechStateName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EQUIP_STATE = #{equipState,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EQUIP_STATE_NAME = #{equipStateName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UNIT = #{unit,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UNIT_NAME = #{unitName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
INSURANCE_DATE = #{insuranceDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
USE_COMPANY_ID = #{useCompanyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
USE_ORG_ID = #{useOrgId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
IS_PARTICULAR = #{isParticular,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LONGITUDE = #{longitude,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
LATITUDE = #{latitude,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
RESPONSI_CODE = #{responsiCode,jdbcType=BIGINT},
REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ASSETS_NO = #{assetsNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ASSETS_NAME = #{assetsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SOURCE_TYPE = #{sourceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SOURCE_TYPE_NAME = #{sourceTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
APPROVE_TYPE = #{approveType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ASSETS_NUM = #{assetsNum,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
ASSETS_CATEGORY_TYPE = #{assetsCategoryType,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
RUN_STATUS = #{runStatus,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
ENERGY_STATUS = #{energyStatus,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
OIL_NUM_TYPE = #{oilNumType,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
ITEM_CATEGORY = #{itemCategory,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
ITEM_NAME = #{itemName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ASSETS_TYPE = #{assetsType,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
FLOW_ID = #{flowId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
PK_USEDORG = #{pkUsedorg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PK_OWNERORG = #{pkOwnerorg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DEFINE4 = #{define4,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DEFINE8 = #{define8,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DEFINE13 = #{define13,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DEFINE14 = #{define14,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DEFINE15 = #{define15,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DEFINE18 = #{define18,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DEFINE19 = #{define19,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DEFINE20 = #{define20,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DEFINE21 = #{define21,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DEFINE22 = #{define22,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DEFINE23 = #{define23,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DEFINE109 = #{define109,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DEFINE28 = #{define28,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DEFINE44 = #{define44,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PK_ORG = #{pkOrg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE E_M_EQPT_INFO SET DEL_FLAG = 1, DELETE_BY = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, DELETE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, DELETE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT e.ID AS id, e.EQUIP_CODE AS equipCode, e.EQUIP_NAME AS equipName, e.EQUIP_BIG_CATEGORY_NAME AS equipBigCategoryName, e.EQUIP_MIDDLE_CATEGORY_NAME AS equipMiddleCategoryName, e.EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_NAME AS equipSmallCategoryName, e.ID AS value, ( CASE WHEN e.EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN e.EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_NAME ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN e.EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL AND e.EQUIP_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN ' - ' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN e.EQUIP_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN e.EQUIP_NAME ELSE '' END ) AS label FROM E_M_EQPT_INFO e WHERE e.DEL_FLAG = 0
AND (e.EQUIP_NAME LIKE #{keywordPattern} OR e.EQUIP_CODE LIKE #{keywordPattern})
ORDER BY e.EQUIP_BIG_CATEGORY_NAME, e.EQUIP_MIDDLE_CATEGORY_NAME, e.EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_NAME, e.EQUIP_NAME
